# Record Status Marking Rules

In the daily note records section, mark each record with a suffix:

| Status | Mark | Example |
|---|---|---|
| Unprocessed | no mark | `- 09:15 content...` |
| Converted to permanent note | `-> [[Note Title]]` | `- 09:15 content... -> [[Note Title]]` |
| Converted to task | `-> task` | `- 09:15 content... -> task` |
| Processed | `done` | `- 09:15 content... done` |
| Deferred batch processing | `pending /ah-inbox` | `- 09:15 content... pending /ah-inbox` |

A record is unprocessed when it does not contain a conversion mark, processed mark, or pending mark.
